text:
<start_of_turn>user
Foreigners & Citizens ke kya adhikar hain Citizenship Act ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Citizenship Act ke tahat Foreigners & Citizens ke adhikar: Acquisition and termination of Indian citizenship; NRC. Kisi bhi problem ke liye Ministry of Home Affairs se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Business Agreement Checklist kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Business Agreement Checklist (Indian Contract Act 1872) Indian Contract Act ke under aata hai jo 1872 mein enacted hua. Status: Active. Yeh Business Owners par apply hota hai. Key provisions: Parties ki details, scope of work, payment terms, penalty, dispute resolution, termination clause. Authority: Civil Court / Arbitration.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is Election Commission Act under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Election Commission Act falls under Election Commission (Conditions of Service) Act (EC Act 1991), enacted in 1991. Status: Active. Applies to: Election Commission. Key provisions: Powers and conditions of Election Commissioners. Enforced by: Parliament.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Equal Remuneration Act kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Equal Remuneration Act (ERA 1976) Equal Remuneration Act ke under aata hai jo 1976 mein enacted hua. Status: Active (subsumed in Wages Code). Yeh All Workers par apply hota hai. Key provisions: Equal pay for equal work regardless of gender. Authority: Labour Commissioner.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mujhe Climate Change Policy ke baare mein legal advice chahiye.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Climate Change Policy ke baare mein zaroori jaankari: Yeh All Sectors par laagu hota hai. 8 national missions on solar energy, water, forests, etc.. Koi bhi issue hone par Ministry of Environment se sampark karein. Reference: NAPCC 2008 - National Action Plan on Climate Change.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Background Check Consent kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Background Check Consent (DPDP Act 2023) Digital Personal Data Protection Act ke under aata hai jo 2023 mein enacted hua. Status: Active. Yeh Job Candidates par apply hota hai. Key provisions: Employer background check ke liye candidate ki written consent lena zaroori hai. Authority: Data Protection Board.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is Tax Deducted at Source - Section 194C under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Tax Deducted at Source - Section 194C falls under Income Tax Act (TDS on Contractor Payments) (Section 194C IT Act), enacted in 1961. Status: Active (Updated 2024). Applies to: Deductors. Key provisions: 1-2% TDS on payments to contractors above Rs 30,000. Enforced by: Income Tax Department.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is E-Courts Project under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
E-Courts Project falls under National Policy and Action Plan for Implementation of ICT in Indian Courts (E-Courts Phase III), enacted in 2023. Status: Active (Phase III 2023-27). Applies to: Litigants & Lawyers. Key provisions: Digitization of courts; case management system; hybrid hearings. Enforced by: Supreme Court eCommittee.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is Motor Insurance Third Party under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Motor Insurance Third Party falls under Motor Vehicles Act (Motor Vehicles Act 1988), enacted in 1988. Status: Active. Applies to: Vehicle Owners. Key provisions: Third party insurance compulsory; bina insurance gaadi chalana Rs 2000 fine + 3 months jail. Enforced by: MACT / Courts.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mujhe Mental Healthcare Act ke baare mein legal advice chahiye.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Mental Healthcare Act ke baare mein zaroori jaankari: Yeh Persons with Mental Illness par laagu hota hai. Rights of persons with mental illness; advance directives. Koi bhi issue hone par Mental Health Review Board se sampark karein. Reference: MHC Act 2017 - Mental Healthcare Act.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
DPDP Rules 2025 kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
DPDP Rules 2025 (DPDP Rules 2025) Digital Personal Data Protection Rules ke under aata hai jo 2025 mein enacted hua. Status: Active (Notified Feb 2025). Yeh Data Fiduciaries par apply hota hai. Key provisions: Rules under DPDP Act; consent manager; data localisation details. Authority: Data Protection Board.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is Online Shopping Fraud under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Online Shopping Fraud falls under Consumer Protection (E-Commerce) Rules (Consumer Protection E-Commerce Rules 2020), enacted in 2020. Status: Active. Applies to: Online Shoppers. Key provisions: Fake website se fraud hone par cybercrime.gov.in par complaint; bank se chargeback maangein. Enforced by: Cyber Crime Police.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Police Officers ke kya adhikar hain Fake Encounters Liability ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Supreme Court Guidelines on Custodial Deaths (D.K. Basu v State of WB) ke tahat Police Officers ke adhikar: Mandatory procedures during arrest; liability for custodial deaths. Kisi bhi problem ke liye High Court / NHRC se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mental Healthcare Act kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Mental Healthcare Act (MHC Act 2017) Mental Healthcare Act ke under aata hai jo 2017 mein enacted hua. Status: Active. Yeh Persons with Mental Illness par apply hota hai. Key provisions: Rights of persons with mental illness; advance directives. Authority: Mental Health Review Board.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mujhe Hindu Succession Act ke baare mein legal advice chahiye.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Hindu Succession Act ke baare mein zaroori jaankari: Yeh Hindus par laagu hota hai. Intestate succession; daughters have equal coparcenary rights. Koi bhi issue hone par Civil Court se sampark karein. Reference: HSA 1956 - Hindu Succession Act.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Armed Forces Special Powers Act kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Armed Forces Special Powers Act (AFSPA 1958) Armed Forces (Special Powers) Act ke under aata hai jo 1958 mein enacted hua. Status: Active (Reviewed annually). Yeh Armed Forces par apply hota hai. Key provisions: Special powers to armed forces in disturbed areas. Authority: Central Government.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Solo Entrepreneurs ke kya adhikar hain OPC (One Person Company) ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Companies Act 2013 ke tahat Solo Entrepreneurs ke adhikar: Single member company; conversion rules; relaxed compliance. Kisi bhi problem ke liye ROC se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is DPDP Rules 2025 under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
DPDP Rules 2025 falls under Digital Personal Data Protection Rules (DPDP Rules 2025), enacted in 2025. Status: Active (Notified Feb 2025). Applies to: Data Fiduciaries. Key provisions: Rules under DPDP Act; consent manager; data localisation details. Enforced by: Data Protection Board.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mujhe Property Purchase Checklist ke baare mein legal advice chahiye.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Property Purchase Checklist ke baare mein zaroori jaankari: Yeh Property Buyers par laagu hota hai. Title deed, EC, building plan approval, OC, RERA registration, mutation, no dues certificate. Koi bhi issue hone par Sub-Registrar / RERA se sampark karein. Reference: Registration Act + RERA - Registration Act & RERA Act.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Transgender Persons ke kya adhikar hain Transgender Persons Act ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Transgender Persons (Protection of Rights) Act ke tahat Transgender Persons ke adhikar: Recognition of transgender identity; prohibition of discrimination. Kisi bhi problem ke liye National Council / Courts se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is Limitation Act under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Limitation Act falls under Limitation Act (Limitation Act 1963), enacted in 1963. Status: Active. Applies to: All Litigants. Key provisions: Time limits for filing civil suits and appeals. Enforced by: Civil Courts.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Criminal Trespass kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Criminal Trespass (Section 329-334 BNS) Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita ke under aata hai jo 2023 mein enacted hua. Status: Active. Yeh All Persons par apply hota hai. Key provisions: Entering property without authorization. Authority: Magistrate Court.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is Service Deficiency Claim under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Service Deficiency Claim falls under Consumer Protection Act (Consumer Protection Act 2019), enacted in 2019. Status: Active. Applies to: Service Recipients. Key provisions: Doctor, hospital, builder, bank - sabki service mein kami par consumer forum mein complaint. Enforced by: Consumer Commission.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Educational Institutions ke kya adhikar hain NEP 2020 ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
National Education Policy ke tahat Educational Institutions ke adhikar: Restructuring of education system; 5+3+3+4 structure. Kisi bhi problem ke liye Ministry of Education se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Explosive Substances Act kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Explosive Substances Act (ES Act 1908) Explosive Substances Act ke under aata hai jo 1908 mein enacted hua. Status: Active. Yeh All Persons par apply hota hai. Key provisions: Possession and use of explosive substances; death penalty possible. Authority: Sessions Court.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Consumers ke kya adhikar hain Misleading Advertisement ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Consumer Protection Act ke tahat Consumers ke adhikar: Misleading ad dekhne par CCPA ko complaint karein; brand ko fine lag sakta hai. Kisi bhi problem ke liye Central Consumer Protection Authority se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is Overtime Pay Rules under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Overtime Pay Rules falls under Code on Wages (Code on Wages 2019), enacted in 2019. Status: Active. Applies to: All Workers. Key provisions: 9 ghante se zyada kaam par double rate OT pay milna chahiye; compensatory off bhi valid. Enforced by: Labour Commissioner.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
National Security Act kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
National Security Act (NSA 1980) National Security Act ke under aata hai jo 1980 mein enacted hua. Status: Active. Yeh Government par apply hota hai. Key provisions: Preventive detention for national security; 12 months max. Authority: Advisory Board / High Court.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Listed Companies ke kya adhikar hain SEBI LODR Regulations ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations ke tahat Listed Companies ke adhikar: Disclosure requirements for listed companies; corporate governance. Kisi bhi problem ke liye SEBI se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is OTT Platform Regulations under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
OTT Platform Regulations falls under Information Technology Rules (OTT Self-Regulation) (IT (Intermediary) Rules Part III), enacted in 2021. Status: Active. Applies to: OTT Platforms & Content Creators. Key provisions: Three-tier grievance redressal for digital content creators. Enforced by: MIB / Courts.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is Information Technology Act under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Information Technology Act falls under Information Technology Act (IT Act 2000), enacted in 2000. Status: Active (Amended 2008). Applies to: All Persons. Key provisions: Cyber crimes, e-commerce, digital signatures. Enforced by: Cyber Appellate Tribunal / Court.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is Business Agreement Checklist under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Business Agreement Checklist falls under Indian Contract Act (Indian Contract Act 1872), enacted in 1872. Status: Active. Applies to: Business Owners. Key provisions: Parties ki details, scope of work, payment terms, penalty, dispute resolution, termination clause. Enforced by: Civil Court / Arbitration.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Separated Parents ke kya adhikar hain Child Custody Rights ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Hindu Minority and Guardianship Act ke tahat Separated Parents ke adhikar: 5 saal tak bacha ma ke paas rehta hai; uske baad court child welfare dekhkar decide karta hai. Kisi bhi problem ke liye Family Court se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Political Parties & Donors ke kya adhikar hain Electoral Bonds (Struck Down) ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Electoral Bonds Scheme ke tahat Political Parties & Donors ke adhikar: Anonymous political funding through SBI; struck down as unconstitutional. Kisi bhi problem ke liye Supreme Court of India se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is Intermediary Liability under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Intermediary Liability falls under Information Technology Act (Section 79 IT Act), enacted in 2000. Status: Active. Applies to: Online Platforms. Key provisions: Safe harbour for intermediaries if due diligence followed. Enforced by: Courts.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Wrongful Termination kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Wrongful Termination (Industrial Disputes Act / IR Code 2020) Industrial Relations Code ke under aata hai jo 2020 mein enacted hua. Status: Active. Yeh Employees par apply hota hai. Key provisions: 100+ workers ki company mein retrenchment ke liye govt permission zaroori; 1 month notice ya pay. Authority: Labour Court / Industrial Tribunal.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mujhe Right to Know EMI Breakup ke baare mein legal advice chahiye.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Right to Know EMI Breakup ke baare mein zaroori jaankari: Yeh Borrowers par laagu hota hai. Bank ko KFS (Key Fact Statement) dena zaroori; APR clearly batana hoga. Koi bhi issue hone par Banking Ombudsman se sampark karein. Reference: RBI Digital Lending Guidelines 2022 - Reserve Bank of India Digital Lending Guidelines.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is Muslim Women Protection Act under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Muslim Women Protection Act falls under Muslim Women (Protection of Rights on Marriage) Act (MWP Act 2019), enacted in 2019. Status: Active. Applies to: Muslim Women. Key provisions: Triple talaq criminalized; imprisonment up to 3 years. Enforced by: Magistrate Court.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mujhe Claim Rejection Rules ke baare mein legal advice chahiye.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Claim Rejection Rules ke baare mein zaroori jaankari: Yeh Insurance Claimants par laagu hota hai. Insurer 30 din mein claim settle kare ya reject kare; reasons likhit mein dene honge. Koi bhi issue hone par Insurance Ombudsman se sampark karein. Reference: IRDAI Claim Regulations - IRDAI (Protection of Policyholders Interests) Regulations.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mujhe Defective Product Complaint ke baare mein legal advice chahiye.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Defective Product Complaint ke baare mein zaroori jaankari: Yeh Consumers par laagu hota hai. Defective product ke liye replacement ya refund maang sakte hain; 2 saal warranty implied. Koi bhi issue hone par District Consumer Commission se sampark karein. Reference: Consumer Protection Act 2019 - Consumer Protection Act.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Contracting Parties ke kya adhikar hain Notarized vs Registered Agreement ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Registration Act ke tahat Contracting Parties ke adhikar: Notarization aur registration alag hai; property ke liye registration zaroori hai notarization nahi. Kisi bhi problem ke liye Sub-Registrar / Notary se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is Police Act under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Police Act falls under Police Act (Police Act 1861), enacted in 1861. Status: Active (Being replaced state-by-state). Applies to: Police Officers. Key provisions: Organization and powers of police; discipline. Enforced by: State Government.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Society Maintenance Dispute kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Society Maintenance Dispute (Cooperative Societies Act (State)) Various State Cooperative Societies Acts ke under aata hai jo 1960 mein enacted hua. Status: Active. Yeh Apartment Owners par apply hota hai. Key provisions: Society aapki parking ya amenities rokne ka adhikar nahi; maintenance rate BOD decide karta hai. Authority: Registrar of Cooperative Societies.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Hospitals & Patients ke kya adhikar hain Transplantation of Human Organs ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Transplantation of Human Organs and Tissues Act ke tahat Hospitals & Patients ke adhikar: Regulates organ transplantation; prevents organ trafficking. Kisi bhi problem ke liye Authorisation Committee se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mujhe Supreme Court Rules ke baare mein legal advice chahiye.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Supreme Court Rules ke baare mein zaroori jaankari: Yeh Litigants par laagu hota hai. Procedure for filing cases before Supreme Court. Koi bhi issue hone par Supreme Court of India se sampark karein. Reference: SC Rules 2013 - Supreme Court Rules.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is Maintenance of Wife under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Maintenance of Wife falls under Bharatiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita (Section 125 CrPC / 144 BNSS), enacted in 2023. Status: Active. Applies to: Dependents. Key provisions: Magistrate can order maintenance for wife, children, parents. Enforced by: Magistrate Court.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
All Persons ke kya adhikar hain Information Technology Act ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Information Technology Act ke tahat All Persons ke adhikar: Cyber crimes, e-commerce, digital signatures. Kisi bhi problem ke liye Cyber Appellate Tribunal / Court se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mujhe GST E-Invoicing ke baare mein legal advice chahiye.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
GST E-Invoicing ke baare mein zaroori jaankari: Yeh Businesses above threshold par laagu hota hai. Mandatory electronic invoice; IRN generation from IRP. Koi bhi issue hone par GST Portal / GSTIN se sampark karein. Reference: GST E-Invoice Rules - GST E-Invoicing Regulations.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Employees ke kya adhikar hain Wrongful Termination ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Industrial Relations Code ke tahat Employees ke adhikar: 100+ workers ki company mein retrenchment ke liye govt permission zaroori; 1 month notice ya pay. Kisi bhi problem ke liye Labour Court / Industrial Tribunal se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Disproportionate Assets kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Disproportionate Assets (Section 13(1)(e) PC Act) Prevention of Corruption Act ke under aata hai jo 1988 mein enacted hua. Status: Active. Yeh Public Servants par apply hota hai. Key provisions: Possession of assets disproportionate to known income sources. Authority: Special Court.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is Senior Citizen Bank Account Benefits under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Senior Citizen Bank Account Benefits falls under RBI Guidelines for Senior Citizens (RBI Circular on Senior Citizens), enacted in 2020. Status: Active. Applies to: Senior Citizens (75+). Key provisions: 75+ senior citizens ko sirf ITR file karna hai TDS nahi; special FD rates milte hain. Enforced by: Banks / Income Tax Dept.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Property Transfer Reversal kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Property Transfer Reversal (MWPSC Act Section 23) Maintenance and Welfare of Parents and Senior Citizens Act ke under aata hai jo 2007 mein enacted hua. Status: Active. Yeh Senior Citizens par apply hota hai. Key provisions: Agar bachon ne property le li aur care nahi ki toh transfer void karwa sakte hain court se. Authority: Sub-Divisional Magistrate.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is Sale of Goods Act under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Sale of Goods Act falls under Sale of Goods Act (SOGA 1930), enacted in 1930. Status: Active. Applies to: Buyers & Sellers. Key provisions: Conditions and warranties in sale of goods. Enforced by: Civil Court.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mujhe Rent Agreement Checklist ke baare mein legal advice chahiye.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Rent Agreement Checklist ke baare mein zaroori jaankari: Yeh Tenants & Landlords par laagu hota hai. Names, property address, rent amount, deposit, duration, maintenance terms, notice period clearly likhein. Koi bhi issue hone par Rent Authority se sampark karein. Reference: Model Tenancy Act 2021 - Model Tenancy Act.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mujhe Dowry Prohibition Act ke baare mein legal advice chahiye.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Dowry Prohibition Act ke baare mein zaroori jaankari: Yeh All Persons par laagu hota hai. Prohibition and punishment for giving/taking dowry. Koi bhi issue hone par Magistrate Court se sampark karein. Reference: DPA 1961 - Dowry Prohibition Act.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Bureau of Indian Standards kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Bureau of Indian Standards (BIS Act 2016) Bureau of Indian Standards Act ke under aata hai jo 2016 mein enacted hua. Status: Active. Yeh Manufacturers par apply hota hai. Key provisions: Quality standards; ISI mark; hallmarking of gold. Authority: BIS.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is Persons with Disabilities Act under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Persons with Disabilities Act falls under Rights of Persons with Disabilities Act (RPwD Act 2016), enacted in 2016. Status: Active. Applies to: Persons with Disabilities. Key provisions: Rights and entitlements of disabled persons; 21 categories. Enforced by: State Commissioner for Disabilities.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is Title Verification Before Buying under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Title Verification Before Buying falls under Transfer of Property Act (Transfer of Property Act 1882), enacted in 1882. Status: Active. Applies to: Property Buyers. Key provisions: Kharidte waqt 30 saal ki title history check karein; encumbrance certificate zaroor lein. Enforced by: Civil Court / Registrar.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Accused ke kya adhikar hain Charge Framing Timeline ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Bharatiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita ke tahat Accused ke adhikar: 60-day limit for framing charges after cognizance. Kisi bhi problem ke liye Sessions Court se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is Muslim Personal Law under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Muslim Personal Law falls under Muslim Personal Law (Shariat) Application Act (Muslim Personal Law), enacted in 1937. Status: Active. Applies to: Muslims. Key provisions: Governs marriage, divorce, inheritance for Muslims. Enforced by: Family Court.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is Force Majeure Clause under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Force Majeure Clause falls under Indian Contract Act (Indian Contract Act Section 56), enacted in 1872. Status: Active. Applies to: All Contracting Parties. Key provisions: Natural disaster, pandemic par kaam rok sakte hain; COVID ke cases mein courts ne accept kiya. Enforced by: Civil Court / Arbitration.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Banks & NBFCs ke kya adhikar hain RBI Regulations ke tahat?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Reserve Bank of India Act ke tahat Banks & NBFCs ke adhikar: Functions of RBI; monetary policy; currency management. Kisi bhi problem ke liye Reserve Bank of India se sampark karein.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is Contempt of Court Act under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Contempt of Court Act falls under Contempt of Courts Act (Contempt of Courts Act 1971), enacted in 1971. Status: Active. Applies to: All Persons. Key provisions: Civil and criminal contempt; simple imprisonment up to 6 months. Enforced by: High Court / Supreme Court.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
CVC Act kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
CVC Act (CVC Act 2003) Central Vigilance Commission Act ke under aata hai jo 2003 mein enacted hua. Status: Active. Yeh Public Servants par apply hota hai. Key provisions: Independent body to oversee vigilance in central government. Authority: Central Vigilance Commission.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is Right to Balance Sheet Before Auction under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Right to Balance Sheet Before Auction falls under SARFAESI Act (SARFAESI Section 13(8)), enacted in 2002. Status: Active. Applies to: Mortgage Borrowers. Key provisions: Property auction se pehle borrower outstanding amount chuka sakta hai aur property le sakta hai. Enforced by: DRT.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Mujhe Notice Period Enforceability ke baare mein legal advice chahiye.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Notice Period Enforceability ke baare mein zaroori jaankari: Yeh Employees par laagu hota hai. 3 month se zyada notice period unreasonable ho sakta hai; court enforce nahi karti hamesha. Koi bhi issue hone par Labour Court se sampark karein. Reference: Indian Contract Act Section 27 - Indian Contract Act.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
Debt Recovery Tribunal kya hai?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
Debt Recovery Tribunal (DRT Act 1993) Recovery of Debts Due to Banks Act ke under aata hai jo 1993 mein enacted hua. Status: Active. Yeh Banks & Borrowers par apply hota hai. Key provisions: Fast recovery of bank dues above Rs 20 lakh. Authority: Debt Recovery Tribunal.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
What is One Stop Centres under Indian law?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
One Stop Centres falls under Sakhi One Stop Centres Scheme (OSC Scheme 2015), enacted in 2015. Status: Active. Applies to: Women Victims of Violence. Key provisions: Integrated support to women affected by violence; shelter, legal aid, medical. Enforced by: Ministry of Women & Child Development.<end_of_turn>

<start_of_turn>user
